query:
-- Summary of all ChannelHaus services after fixes
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(s.monthlyCost, 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue > s.monthlyCost THEN 'positive'
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue = s.monthlyCost THEN 'breakeven'
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue < s.monthlyCost AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 'negative_partial'
    ELSE 'no_revenue'
  END as marginStatus
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY marginPct ASC
LIMIT 20;

-- Summary of all ChannelHaus services after fixes
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(s.monthlyCost, 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName,
  CASE 
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue > s.monthlyCost THEN 'positive'
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue = s.monthlyCost THEN 'breakeven'
    WHEN s.monthlyRevenue < s.monthlyCost AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 'negative_partial'
    ELSE 'no_revenue'
  END as marginStatus
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY marginPct ASC
LIMIT 20;
